Class RewardSelectionGUIHolder

java.lang.Object
net.sylphian.minecraft.crates.gui.RewardSelectionGUIHolder
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.bukkit.inventory.InventoryHolder
public class RewardSelectionGUIHolder extends Object implements org.bukkit.inventory.InventoryHolder
Holder used to identify reward selection inventories in events and carry the rolled rewards for click handling.

  • Constructor Summary

    Description
    RewardSelectionGUIHolder(List<RewardEntry> rewards, int picks)
    Constructs a new RewardSelectionGUIHolder.

  • Constructor Details

    • RewardSelectionGUIHolder

      public RewardSelectionGUIHolder(List<RewardEntry> rewards, int picks)
      Constructs a new RewardSelectionGUIHolder.
      Parameters:
      rewards - the rolled rewards to display for selection
      picks - how many rewards the player may select

  • Method Details

    • getRewards

      public List<RewardEntry> getRewards()
      Returns the rolled rewards available for selection.
      Returns:
      the list of rolled rewards

    • getPicks

      public int getPicks()
      Returns the total number of rewards the player may select.
      Returns:
      the pick limit

    • getSelected

      public LinkedHashSet<Integer> getSelected()
      Returns the set of currently selected reward indices, in insertion order.
      Returns:
      the selected reward indices

    • toggleSelect

      public boolean toggleSelect(int index)
      Toggles the selection state of the reward at the given index. If the reward is already selected, it is deselected. If it is not selected and the pick limit has not been reached, it is added to the selection.
      Parameters:
      index - the reward slot index to toggle
      Returns:
      true if the reward is now selected, false if deselected or the pick limit was already reached

    • getConfirmSlot

      public int getConfirmSlot()
      Returns the slot index of the confirm button, positioned at the centre of the bottom row.
      Returns:
      the confirm button slot index

    • getInventory

      public org.bukkit.inventory.Inventory getInventory()
      Specified by:
      getInventory in interface org.bukkit.inventory.InventoryHolder

    • setInventory

      public void setInventory(org.bukkit.inventory.Inventory inventory)
      Sets the backing inventory for this holder.
      Parameters:
      inventory - the inventory to back this holder
